item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya berpendapat bahwa prioritas kepentingan masyarakat terlalu sering mengorbankan hak-hak dasar individu.

notes: Agent A starts by agreeing that group or societal interests are often more important than individual rights, then visibly shifts toward a rights-protective balance frame in turns 3 and 5. Agent B remains consistently balanced but rights-protective, emphasizing unity/tradition alongside individual dignity and diverse voices.
